nasb.text: Then all the inhabitants of Egypt will know that I am the Lord, Because they have been only a staff made of reed to the house of Israel.

esv.text: Then all the inhabitants of Egypt shall know that I am the Lord. “Because you have been a staff of reed to the house of Israel,

cnv.text: 埃及所有的居民就都知道我是耶和華。 因為你作了以色列家蘆葦的杖。

ccb.text: “‘这样，所有的埃及人就知道我是耶和华，因为你不过是一根芦苇，以色列人无法依靠你。
